description_long: This is a military-style helmet with a rounded dome shape and a camouflage fabric cover in green and brown tones. Around the base of the helmet is a fabric band, and on one side, several rifle cartridges are tucked into the band, adding a utilitarian detail. The helmet features handwritten text reading 'BORN TO CHILL' in black marker on one side, giving it a personalized and informal touch. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, consistent with fabric-wrapped helmets used in combat or tactical scenarios. There are no visible ventilation holes or visors, and the retention system consists of a simple chin strap. The overall design is rugged and functional, suitable for urban or military environments.
description: A green and brown camouflage military helmet with a fabric band, rifle cartridges, and handwritten text 'BORN TO CHILL' on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded dome and camouflage pattern, with the fabric band visible but no text or cartridges.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the 'BORN TO CHILL' text and several rifle cartridges tucked into the band.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the continuous camouflage pattern and band, with the cartridges partially visible on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain camouflage surface and band, with no text or cartridges visible.
attribute_graphic_design: Camouflage pattern in green and brown with handwritten text 'BORN TO CHILL' and rifle cartridges attached to the band.
